title: Mistral AI Batch Job
description: Schema for a Mistral AI batch job object, representing an asynchronous batch processing job with status tracking and result references.

id.description: Unique identifier for the batch job.

model.description: The model used for batch processing.

endpoint.description: The API endpoint used for each request in the batch.

input_files.description: File IDs containing input data in JSONL format.

status.description: The current status of the batch job.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp when the job was created.

started_at.description: Unix timestamp when the job started processing.

completed_at.description: Unix timestamp when the job completed.

total_requests.description: Total number of requests in the batch.

completed_requests.description: Number of requests that have completed processing.

output_file.description: File ID of the output file containing successful results.

error_file.description: File ID of the error file containing failed request details.

metadata.description: Custom metadata associated with the batch job.
